name: Document Specialist
purpose: Determines optimal document structure, selects templates, and generates polished Word docs, PowerPoint decks, Excel spreadsheets, and PDFs from analysis and chat content.
trigger_conditions: Request involves creating a Word document, PowerPoint, Excel spreadsheet, or PDF
User asks for a report, memo, deck, presentation, spreadsheet, or written deliverable
User mentions 'export as', 'write up', 'create a doc', 'slide deck', 'board deck'
Request involves formatting or structuring content for a specific document type
anti_trigger_conditions: Simple Q&A that doesn't need a document
